mapper.insert:
select CON_SEQ.nextval from dual
insert into consignment values (#{conNo}, #{conAuthor}, #{conProduct}, #{conWidth}, #{conHeight}, #{conYear}, #{conHope}, #{conEtc}, default, default, sysdate, #{memId})

insert all
into attachment values(att_new, #{item.attRename}, default, #{item.attFno}, #{item.attCategory}, #{item.attBno})
select * from dual
mapper.select: select * from consignment join member using(memId) where CON_DEL_STATUS = 'Y' and CON_NO = #{conNo}
